description_long: This is a tactical pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and compact design suitable for urban environments. The weapon has a skeletonized stock with a pistol grip, providing enhanced maneuverability and control. The barrel is short and thick, optimized for close-quarters use, and the forend is ribbed for a secure grip. The receiver is streamlined, with a visible loading port and a rail on top for mounting optics or accessories. The magazine is tubular, running parallel beneath the barrel, typical for shotguns of this type. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and short barrel, designed for close-quarters urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, tubular magazine, and the alignment of the barrel and forend.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, ribbed forend, and the short barrel with a tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open structure of the stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the loading port and receiver.
